---
title: "Get in Touch"
subtitle: "Let's automate your planning bottlenecks."
---

Ready to transition from manual spreadsheets to a robust, code-driven S&OP framework? Contact us to set up a scoping session where we can audit your current data structures and map out an R-based automation path.

### How to Reach Us
* **Email:** partner@planr.consulting
* **Office Location:** Taipei / International Hybrid Services

---

### Schedule an Audit
If you are currently experiencing any of the following challenges, let us know in your inquiry so we can tailor our initial conversation:
1. S&OP data consolidation takes longer than 2 days each month.
2. High SKU counts are creating massive calculation drag on your inventory sheet formulas.
3. Short-shelf life or expiry tracking requires extensive manual tracking and validation loops.
